title: Adafruit IO API keys should not be disclosed
description: Adafruit IO API keys should not be hardcoded in source code. These keys provide access to Adafruit IO cloud services for IoT device management and data storage. When exposed in code repositories, they can lead to unauthorized access to IoT devices, data feeds, and user accounts.
recommendation: Store Adafruit IO API keys securely using environment variables, secure configuration management, or IoT device secure storage. Never commit them directly to source code repositories.
impact: Critical security risk - unauthorized access to Adafruit IO accounts, IoT devices, and data feeds

compliant.description: Using environment variable for Adafruit IO key

compliant.code:
# Use secure configuration management
key = config.get_secret('adafruit_io_api_key')

checks.message: Adafruit IO API key with aio_ prefix detected in source code
Potential Adafruit IO API key detected in source code
